text.title: Platform Governance: Policy-as-Code + FinOps Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PRs queue waiting for sec review; bypassed in incidents.
Teams have no incentive to optimise; cost is somebody else's problem.
antipattern.fix: Tag spend by team; per-team dashboard.

antipattern.symptom: Surprise bills from PR that quadrupled instance size.
Drift between cluster policies and Git.
